notes: B2 blind evaluation set v2 for 9709 P1/P3. 80 cases were manually reviewed from selected question screenshots and corresponding mark-scheme snippets. Labels are manually authored and traceable. Tier policy: sanity-only regression suite; excluded from threshold calibration.

steps.text: I expand the expression and isolate the required power coefficient.
Then I form the coefficient equation from the compared expansions.
Finally I solve the constant and state the final value clearly.

rubric_points.description: expand the expression and isolate the required power coefficient
form the coefficient equation from the compared expansions
solve the constant and state the final value clearly
